description: Happy path: advance from identified to outreach-sent with all required evidence provided

evidence.notes: Initial outreach email sent regarding fall campaign collaboration for vintage chalk paint line

expect.warnings: empty array or array of non-blocking concerns

prohibit: transition_allowed is false when all required evidence is present
missing_evidence contains items when outreach_date and contact_name are both provided
timestamp_utc uses a date from the evidence object rather than current UTC time
stage_change_record is missing when transition_allowed is true

description: Blocked transition: advance from signed to in-production without agreed_deliverables being true

evidence.notes: Contract signed last week, waiting on deliverables confirmation

prohibit: transition_allowed is true when agreed_deliverables is absent or not true
stage_change_record is present when transition_allowed is false
missing_evidence is empty when required evidence is missing
agreed_deliverables inferred or assumed true without being explicitly provided

description: Edge case: attempt to skip stages (identified directly to signed); must be rejected with warning about skipped stages

evidence.notes: Brand wants to fast-track the deal

expect.warnings: non-empty array listing skipped stages (outreach-sent, in-discussion, contract-negotiating)

prohibit: transition_allowed is true when stages are being skipped
stage_change_record is present for a multi-stage jump
warnings is empty when a stage skip was attempted
atom silently advances multiple stages without flagging the skip
